fort-wayne.neighborhoods: Downtown, West Central, North Anthony, Southwood, Bloomingdale, Aboite
fort-wayne.meetingHighlights: Active downtown and suburban meetings with strong newcomer support and diverse meeting formats.
fort-wayne.transitInfo: IPFW and local bus services; accessible via I-69 and regional highways; Fort Wayne International Airport for regional flights.

indianapolis.neighborhoods: Downtown, Broad Ripple, Fountain Square, Meridian-Kessler, Irvington, Mass Ave
indianapolis.meetingHighlights: Large, diverse meeting calendar across the city with many daytime, evening, and specialty meetings including Big Book and LGBTQ+ friendly groups.
indianapolis.transitInfo: IndyGo buses and Red Line rapid transit in core areas; Indianapolis International Airport (IND) serves national flights.

south-bend.neighborhoods: Downtown, Notre Dame area, Near West Side
south-bend.meetingHighlights: University-influenced meetings near Notre Dame and steady neighborhood meetings with evening and weekend options.
south-bend.transitInfo: Transpo buses in South Bend; regional Amtrak service and South Bend International Airport for regional flights.

evansville.neighborhoods: Downtown, West Side, Eastland, North Park
evansville.meetingHighlights: Strong faith-based meeting presence and regular downtown AA meetings with newcomer-friendly formats.
evansville.transitInfo: METS local buses; US-41 and I-69 provide regional driving access; Evansville Regional Airport for flights.

bloomington.neighborhoods: Downtown, Indiana University area, Near West Side
bloomington.meetingHighlights: University-area meetings with varied formats and strong lunchtime and evening groups serving students and residents.
bloomington.transitInfo: BT buses serve the city; close to Monroe County Airport for regional flights; easy highway access via IN-37.

lafayette.meetingHighlights: Meetings that serve both the Purdue community and local residents; a mix of step-study and open discussion groups.
lafayette.transitInfo: CityBus and Purdue Transit provide local transport; Purdue Airport and major highways (I-65 nearby).

gary.neighborhoods: Downtown, Miller Beach, Emerson, Glen Park
gary.meetingHighlights: Community-focused meetings with evening and weekend options; several downtown and neighborhood groups.
gary.transitInfo: Gary Public Transportation Corporation buses and South Shore Line commuter rail to Chicago; proximity to Gary/Chicago International Airport.

terre-haute.areaDescription: Terre Haute and Vigo County along the Wabash River
terre-haute.neighborhoods: Downtown Terre Haute, Indiana State University area, South Side, North Terre Haute, Honey Creek
terre-haute.meetingHighlights: Wabash Valley recovery community with meetings near Indiana State University and downtown churches; evening discussion and Big Book study groups; welcoming fellowship serving surrounding rural counties.
terre-haute.transitInfo: Terre Haute Transit Utility provides local bus service; Terre Haute Regional Airport (HUF); I-70 and US-41 provide regional access.

muncie.areaDescription: Muncie and Delaware County in east-central Indiana
muncie.neighborhoods: Downtown Muncie, Ball State University area, Westside, Old West End, Yorktown
muncie.meetingHighlights: College-town meetings near Ball State University with student-friendly and evening groups; active downtown fellowship and step-study traditions in community centers and churches.
muncie.transitInfo: Muncie Indiana Transit System (MITS) provides local bus service; Delaware County Regional Airport (MIE); I-69 and State Road 332 provide regional access.

carmel.areaDescription: North Indianapolis suburb in Hamilton County
carmel.neighborhoods: City Center, Arts & Design District, Midtown, WestClay, Home Place, Village of WestClay area
carmel.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve north Indianapolis suburbs with strong accessibility for families and professionals.
carmel.transitInfo: Primarily car-oriented via US-31 and I-465; IndyGo regional connections and Indianapolis International Airport serve the area.

hammond.areaDescription: Northwest Indiana city in the Chicago metropolitan area
hammond.neighborhoods: Downtown, Hessville, Robertsdale, Woodmar, Purdue Northwest area, South Hammond
hammond.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the Calumet region with convenient access from northwest Indiana and south Chicagoland.
hammond.transitInfo: Pace and local transit links, South Shore Line nearby, and Interstates 80, 90, and 94 support travel.

fishers.areaDescription: Growing northeast Indianapolis suburb in Hamilton County
fishers.neighborhoods: Downtown Nickel Plate District, Geist area, Saxony, Fishers District, Sunblest, Lantern Road corridor
fishers.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve northeast metro residents with reliable evening and weekend schedules.
fishers.transitInfo: Travel is mainly by car via I-69 and 116th Street; Indianapolis International Airport is the nearest major airport.
